The '''''Hyperspace Marauder''''' was [[Lo Khan]]'s personal smuggling [[Starship/Legends|starship]].

==Characteristics==
A modified [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|''Xiytiar''-class transport]], ''Hyperspace Marauder'' performed for most of its smuggling career without weapons and was relatively slow. It cost 800,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

[[File:HyperspaceMarauder_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Hyperspace Marauder'' [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]]]]

While Lo Khan upgraded the ship's [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and armor plating, he preferred safe, high-traffic [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] to make up for ''Marauder''{{'s}} lack of defenses. In the event of attack, Lo Khan used his ship's onboard communications system that could hijack an attacker's computer. This unique system put the ultimate gun to the heads of raiding vessels, as Khan could shut down any part of a raiding ship, even the life-support systems. His usual MO was much less violent, however—typically, Khan would loot whatever was worth stealing from the enemy ship and shut down the enemy ship's hyperdrive, leaving the would-be raiders to limp along for weeks at sublight speeds and rethink ever crossing Khan again.

==History==
When Lo Khan began running goods to [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] during the [[Palpatine/Legends|reborn Emperor's]] campaign, he finally gave ''Marauder'' some teeth with a pair of [[700-Penetrator]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. His additions could not have been any more timely.

During [[Salla Zend]] and [[Shug Ninx]]'s involvement with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] mission to Byss, they hid the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] inside ''Marauder'', which resulted in ship transport taking crippling damage from a [[Hunter-Killer probot]].

Later, ''Marauder'' joined ''[[Starhook Ten]]'' and ''[[Bespin Bandit]]'' in strafing runs on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Chrysalide|war beasts]] during the [[Battle of the Emperor's Citadel]].
